data.content: Customers can return most items within 30 days of delivery. Electronics must be unused and in original packaging. Some products have extended return windows (e.g., laptop stands: 60 days). Items registered online may not be eligible for return.
VIP customers may receive extended return windows and exceptions on a case-by-case basis as noted in their account.

Customers can return most items within 30 days of delivery. Electronics must be unused and in original packaging. Some products have extended return windows (e.g., laptop stands: 60 days). Items registered online may not be eligible for return.
Refunds are processed within 2-3 business days and appear in the customer account within 5-7 business days. Damaged or defective items get full refunds without needing to return the item.
VIP customers may receive extended return windows and exceptions on a case-by-case basis as noted in their account.
